rows.how: organic orders from brand vs paid on AMZ
rows.impact: branded search 26→111/wk (+327% at SB launch) · brand purchases +30% QoQ · impression share 33→46%
rows.next: Always-on SB defence on “coba” + gift terms (we win only 16% of 1,278 “coba” searches) + hero push on Scrub + Aloe to spawn new branded demand.
rows.blocker: SQP is quarterly with lag; “organic orders brand vs paid” mixes SQP + ad-console sources — pick ONE definition and hold it

rows.how: organic sessions brand vs paid (Direct, Google etc.)
rows.impact: 6,006 branded sessions (+31%) — arriving before the conversion layer exists (see DTC CVR)
rows.next: Point creator/affiliate links at DTC; refill-launch emails drive branded direct. Equestrian community with Lasso + Project Artemis II for viral moments.
rows.blocker: Direct ≠ branded (bookmarks/apps inflate the share); GA4 hides search terms — GSC + strict UTM discipline are the fix

rows.how: total orders ÷ total brand sessions on AMZ
rows.impact: Brand Sponsor drives most of the impression & from other sources (Pinterest, Reddit)
rows.next: Pinterest direct to Amazon + Reddit seeding for summer sales. Amazon Affiliate Program kicked off.
rows.blocker: 39% is implausible as a session CVR — numerator (ALL orders) ÷ denominator (brand sessions only) mismatch; use SQP purchases÷clicks (9.6%, ratio 1.4×) or fix the session join

rows.how: total orders ÷ total brand sessions on Shopify
rows.impact: +870% off a tiny base — brand-curious visitors are arriving; the refill launch page is the unlock
rows.next: Crack “smooth operator” collaboration with ROAS for Meta Ads. Continue branding controlled activities & Artemis II.
rows.blocker: measurement is clean (Shopify) but the base is tiny → noisy monthly reads; judge on the quarter

rows.impact: +834 mentions happened WITHOUT the mandate — the tag would have captured them for free
rows.next: Mandate #cobasdaughter in every post (owned + earned) — the tag rides volume we already pay for, zero extra cost.
rows.blocker: platform search undercounts + varies by account; set a monthly saved-search protocol · bands mis-set (2025 base 1,500 > target 800–1,200) — restate as posts/quarter

rows.next: Scale doublespeed ghost-account seeding + TikTok Affiliate reactivation — push toward the ceiling.
rows.blocker: manual TikTok search varies by account/region/day — fix a logged-out protocol, same day each month

rows.impact: in-band at 4.8% (+108%) while reach grew — the quality bet holding under volume
rows.next: Protect quality while volume ramps: rich branded assets for trial reels as the 20-reels/day engine scales — cadence must not dilute brand.

rows.impact: owned IG reach Jun +312% MoM (events + trial reels); total −19% vs Q1 = the paid-YOTH comparability gap
rows.next: Affiliate Programs (TikTok + Amazon) & Artemis II (CPM model + @thisislasso + trial reels + ghost-account seeding).

rows.how: Shopify Google-traffic report (GSC not set up)

rows.how: DMs + contact form + email inquiries / mo

rows.next: Comment-concierge SOP: reply to every new follower with a welcome code (in active); CS's AI project support.
rows.blocker: no central log — 150/mo is an estimate; stand up one CS sheet + a what-counts definition before Q3 reads

rows.impact: 45 in ONE quarter = 2–3× the annual bar; the May pause (−85% impressions) showed what stopping costs
rows.next: Hold a steady ~10-post/mo cadence — problem/solution + skin advice; test safer subreddits.
rows.blocker: F5Bot is named but not actually configured (2025 = 0 because untracked; Q2's 45 was a manual count) — set alerts now; note F5Bot misses comment-level mentions

rows.impact: +5.5K in Q2 — but TYB is 4,453 of it (81%); social-follower growth is the slow lane the trial reels must fix

rubric: ON TRACK = in/above the 12-mo band · SCALE = below band but pace reaches it inside 12 months · BELOW = below band, pace insufficient · NEED FIX = the tracked number itself is unreliable (definition/log broken) — fix measurement before judging
